fato_historico: 1848: Women's rights: A two-day Women's Rights Convention opens in Seneca Falls, New York.
energia_do_dia: Today carries an echo of monumental shifts, much like the historic moment when voices gathered to demand equality and justice. You may feel a stirring desire to assert your own boundaries and lead with integrity. Consider this a good time to advocate for your worth and plant seeds of progress that will bloom beautifully in your future.
frase_do_dia: Your voice has the strength to change the rhythm of your world today.
significado_numero: The number of independence and achieving your highest potential through resilience.
conselho: Stand tall in your truth and trust the path you are currently carving.
